summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. Hydrated open PRs are kept independently for maintainer review/proof except exact items now routed to central security handling after deterministic validation marked them security-sensitive. Refs whose live state was unavailable remain scoped needs_human items because target kind and updated_at could not be hydrated.

actions.reason: Open independent PR requiring proof/maintainer review; no close or merge action is allowed in plan mode.
Feature/bugfix PR should remain independently reviewable; no safe duplicate, superseded, merge, or close action is proven.
Independent open PR with potentially useful code; keep for normal review/proof.
Independent open PR; bot review/check uncertainty blocks merge but not non-mutating classification.
Quarantine only this PR with non-mutating route_security; continue classifying unrelated non-security items.
Independent candidate PR; no mutation or superseded closure is safe from this shard.
Independent provider feature/fix PR requiring proof and review; no close action is supported.
Route this secrets-runtime-adjacent PR to central security handling instead of keeping it in backlog-cleanup classification.
Independent open PR requiring review/proof; no duplicate or superseded evidence.
Potentially related sandbox/Docker work, but not a proven duplicate; keep independently.
Independent open PR with focused gateway changes; keep for proof/review.
Large runtime isolation PR is quarantined for central security review; unrelated items remain independently classified.
Specific live-state hydration gap; re-run hydration before classification or any mutation.
